The '''''Venom''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet and was lost at the [[Battle of Selaggis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{Mo}}
